name: ultraloop
description: Autonomous software-engineering loop for Claude Code built from exactly three mechanisms: a GitHub Projects v2 board as the single source of truth (WHAT — pm fills it, loop drains it), dynamic multi-agent workflows designed per work item and codified into reusable scripts (HOW — shipped workflows/ library: milestone-fanout drains one whole milestone per invocation via a reasoning-built, code-validated dependency graph and parallel waves, plus lane-fanout, pm-chain, adversarial-verify; casting policy in code: coding agents sonnet-xhigh, reasoning/verification inherit the main session), and a goal engine that self-paces with /loop and refuses to stop before the Definition of Done with /goal, behind fail-open hard guards (WHEN). Two role-separated skills plus the bundled board authority: ultraloop:pm plans (product-strategy -> outcome-roadmap -> strategy-red-team -> speckit -> prioritization) and writes the board with no Write/Edit tool; ultraloop:loop reads that board and ships it via TDD + pre-merge production E2E, faithfully logging progress back to the board; gh-roadmap owns board structure (one board may span N repos — each repo runs its own single-repo session on its assigned slice).
